---
title: "TIPS DASHBOARD | RESTAURANT BILLING INSIGHTS"
format: dashboard
page-layout: custom
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import itables

# Load dataset
tips = px.data.tips()

# Core metrics
total_revenue = round(tips["total_bill"].sum(), 2)
avg_tip = round(tips["tip"].mean(), 2)
avg_tip_pct = round((tips["tip"] / tips["total_bill"]).mean() * 100, 1)

largest_bill_row = tips.sort_values("total_bill", ascending=False).iloc[0]
largest_bill_value = round(largest_bill_row["total_bill"], 2)
largest_bill_day = largest_bill_row["day"]

# Tip percentage column
tips["tip_pct"] = tips["tip"] / tips["total_bill"] * 100

# Revenue by day
rev_day = tips.groupby("day", as_index=False)["total_bill"].sum()

bar_rev_day = px.bar(
    rev_day,
    x="day",
    y="total_bill",
    color="total_bill",
    color_continuous_scale="Teal",
    title="Total Revenue by Day",
).update_layout(coloraxis_showscale=False)

# Scatter: bill vs tip
scatter_fig = px.scatter(
    tips,
    x="total_bill",
    y="tip",
    color="time",
    size="size",
    hover_data=["day", "sex", "smoker"],
    title="Relationship Between Total Bill and Tip",
)

# Boxplot tip percentage by day
box_fig = px.box(
    tips,
    x="day",
    y="tip_pct",
    color="day",
    points="all",
    title="Tip Percentage Distribution by Day",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Bold,
).update_layout(showlegend=False)

# Pivot summary
pivot_table = tips.pivot_table(
    values="tip_pct", index="day", columns="time", aggfunc="mean"
).round(1)
```

# HOME

## Row {height=30%}

::: {.valuebox icon="currency-dollar" color="#0F766E" title="Total Revenue"}
`{python} f"${total_revenue}"`
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="cash-coin" color="#FACC15" title="Average Tip ($)"}
`{python} f"${avg_tip}"`
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="percent" color="#1E3A8A" title="Average Tip (%)"}
`{python} f"{avg_tip_pct}%"`
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="graph-up-arrow" color="#9333EA" title="Largest Bill"}
`{python} f"${largest_bill_value}"`
`{python} largest_bill_day`
:::

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {width="60%"}
```{python}
scatter_fig
```

### Column {width="40%"}
```{python}
bar_rev_day
```

# TIPPING PATTERNS

## Row {height=60%}

### Column {width="70%"}
```{python}
box_fig
```

### Column {width="30%"}

### Observations

- Weekend days show higher bill variability.
- Dinner generates larger bills than lunch.
- Tip percentage distribution is relatively stable with some high outliers.
- Larger party sizes produce larger total tips but similar percentages.

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width="50%"}
```{python}
px.histogram(
    tips,
    x="tip_pct",
    nbins=20,
    color_discrete_sequence=["#0F766E"],
    title="Distribution of Tip Percentages"
)
```

### Column {width="50%"}
```{python}
px.pie(
    tips,
    names="time",
    title="Lunch vs Dinner Share",
    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set2
)
```

# DATA DOWNLOAD

```{python}
itables.show(
    tips,
    caption="Full Tips Dataset",
    buttons=["csvHtml5"]
)
```

# ABOUT

This dashboard uses the built-in `tips` dataset from Plotly Express.
